positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a whimsical forest creature—a blend of fox, owl, and cosmic nebula elements. The creature is captured mid-leap, forming a strong, graceful silhouette against a deep indigo, teal, and lavender gradient sky. Use linocut print techniques combined with watercolor fluidity for texture. The background should feature abstract constellations and stylized botanicals (ferns, glowing mushrooms) that frame the central subject without distraction. Strong contrast is key: the subject should be primarily rendered in warm ochre, burnt orange, and creamy yellow, popping against the cool, saturated background. Studio shot quality, high detail, vector graphic feel, suitable for a t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, deformed, low quality, amateur, noise, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, bokeh, oversaturated, dirty background
